episodes.title: I ESCAPED A CULT… THIS IS WHAT HAPPENED
episodes.description:
In this raw and unfiltered episode, Chantal Di Donato shares the truth about the four years she spent inside a rigid, controlling belief system that slowly drained her physically, mentally, and emotionally.
What began as a search for meaning turned into something far more consuming—leaving her exhausted, overwhelmed, and disconnected from herself.
At her lowest point, facing serious health challenges including adrenal fatigue and diabetes, Chantal turned inward—and to raw, natural foods—as a way to heal.
But what followed wasn’t just physical recovery.
As her body began to repair, something deeper shifted. The fog lifted. The questions got louder. And the clarity she gained gave her the strength to face a difficult truth: she was living in something she needed to escape.
This is the story of what it really takes to walk away—from a belief system, from expectations, and from a life that no longer feels like your own.
A story of awakening, courage, and taking your power back.
